cmd:
if [ -z "$N8N_API_KEY" ] || [ -z "$GITHUB_TOKEN" ]; then echo MISSING_ENV; exit 0; fi
python3 - <<'PY'
import json,urllib.request,urllib.error,base64,os
tok=os.environ["GITHUB_TOKEN"]; key=os.environ["N8N_API_KEY"]
ref="claude/n8n-cmr-draft-automation-8tdhbk"
path="n8n/cmr-draft/CMR_draft_workflow.json"
gh="https://api.github.com/repos/irynakarmazina-bot/Iryna_Karmazina/contents/"+path+"?ref="+ref
r=urllib.request.Request(gh,headers={"Authorization":"token "+tok,"Accept":"application/vnd.github.v3+json"})
d=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(r,timeout=20))
wf=json.loads(base64.b64decode(d["content"]).decode())
body={k:wf[k] for k in ("name","nodes","connections","settings") if k in wf}
data=json.dumps(body).encode()
req=urllib.request.Request("https://irynakarmazina.app.n8n.cloud/api/v1/workflows",data=data,method="POST",headers={"X-N8N-API-KEY":key,"Content-Type":"application/json","Accept":"application/json"})
try:
    resp=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(req,timeout=30))
    print("CREATED id="+str(resp.get("id"))+" active="+str(resp.get("active"))+" name="+str(resp.get("name")))
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
    print("HTTP",e.code); print(e.read().decode()[:700])
PY
